T-House

Copied

Chinese swimmers are tested twice or three times more than others and clearly no violations have been found. But you can never wake someone who pretends to be asleep, who is too eager to tarnish China's anti-doping efforts and intervene in international sports.

(If you want to contribute and have specific expertise, please contact us at opinions@cgtn.com. Follow@thouse_opinionson Twitter to discover the latest commentaries in the CGTN Opinion Section.)

title: Many more doping tests on Chinese swimmers at Paris Olympics - CGTN
author: T-House,CGTN
description: Chinese swimmers are tested twice or three times more than others and clearly no violations have been found. But you can never wake someone who pretends to be asleep, who is too eager to tarnish China's anti-doping efforts and intervene in international sports.
